description: Create comprehensive visualization comparing MJ1511 with characterized AhpD enzymes showing missing catalytic features
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 12), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [2.5, 1.5, 2]})

# --- Panel A: Catalytic residue comparison ---
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title('A. Catalytic Residue Comparison: Characterized AhpD vs MJ1511', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

proteins = ['Mtb AhpD\n(P9WQB5)', 'S.griseus AhpD\n(B1W2G7)', 'M.marinum AhpD\n(B2HD59)', 'R.erythropolis AhpD\n(C0ZYQ9)', 'MJ1511\n(Q58906)']
# Residues: CxxC present, His present, Glu present, Proton relay intact
features = ['CxxC motif', 'Catalytic His\n(proton relay)', 'Glu\n(proton relay)', 'Complete catalytic\nmachinery']

# Data: 1=present, 0=absent
data = np.array([
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Mtb AhpD
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # S. griseus
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # M. marinum
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # R. erythropolis
    [0, 0, 1, 0],  # MJ1511
])

colors = np.where(data == 1, '#2ecc71', '#e74c3c')
for i in range(len(proteins)):
    for j in range(len(features)):
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((j-0.4, i-0.35), 0.8, 0.7, 
                                         boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
                                         facecolor=colors[i][j], alpha=0.8)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        label = '✓' if data[i][j] == 1 else '✗'
        ax.text(j, i, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold',
                color='white')

ax.set_yticks(range(len(proteins)))
ax.set_yticklabels(proteins, fontsize=10)
ax.set_xticks(range(len(features)))
ax.set_xticklabels(features, fontsize=10)
ax.set_xlim(-0.6, len(features)-0.4)
ax.set_ylim(-0.6, len(proteins)-0.4)
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_frame_on(False)
ax.tick_params(axis='both', which='both', length=0)

# Add legend
present_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2ecc71', label='Present')
absent_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', label='Absent')
ax.legend(handles=[present_patch, absent_patch], loc='upper right', fontsize=10)

# --- Panel B: CxxC motif in sequences ---
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('B. CxxC Motif Context in Sequences', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')
ax2.axis('off')

motif_data = [
    ('Mtb AhpD',     '...AINGCSHCLVAH...', 'CSHC @ pos 130-133'),
    ('S.griseus',    '...AINGCGQCLDSH...', 'CGQC @ pos 132-135'),
    ('M.marinum',    '...SVNGCSHCVVAH...', 'CSHC @ pos 130-133'),
    ('R.erythropolis','...AINGCNHCLEAH...', 'CNHC @ pos 130-133'),
    ('MJ1511',       '...VKKNCPEFYEAV...VAGDQC', 'C17 and C107 — 90 aa apart, NO CxxC'),
]

y_start = 0.95
for i, (name, motif, note) in enumerate(motif_data):
    y = y_start - i * 0.18
    color = '#e74c3c' if 'MJ1511' in name else '#2c3e50'
    weight = 'bold' if 'MJ1511' in name else 'normal'
    ax2.text(0.02, y, f'{name}:', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color,
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='top', fontfamily='monospace')
    ax2.text(0.20, y, motif, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', color=color,
             fontweight=weight, transform=ax2.transAxes, va='top')
    ax2.text(0.62, y, note, fontsize=9, fontstyle='italic', color=color,
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='top')

# --- Panel C: Structural distance ---
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_title('C. Evidence Summary Against Thiol-Disulfide Oxidoreductase Activity', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')
ax3.axis('off')

evidence_items = [
    ('1. CxxC Motif', 'ABSENT — two Cys residues are 90 aa apart (positions 17 and 107)', '#e74c3c'),
    ('2. 3D Cys Distance', 'SG–SG = 36.5 Å (disulfide requires ≤4–5 Å)', '#e74c3c'),
    ('3. Catalytic His', 'ZERO histidines in entire 107-aa sequence', '#e74c3c'),
    ('4. Proton Relay', 'His–Glu relay system completely absent', '#e74c3c'),
    ('5. Protein Size', '107 aa vs 177 aa for characterized AhpD', '#e67e22'),
    ('6. GO Annotation', 'GO:0016491 (IBA) transferred from Mtb AhpD without residue check', '#e67e22'),
    ('7. GO:0016671', 'Not currently annotated — hypothesis proposes adding it', '#3498db'),
]

y_start = 0.95
for i, (label, desc, color) in enumerate(evidence_items):
    y = y_start - i * 0.13
    ax3.text(0.02, y, label, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color,
             transform=ax3.transAxes, va='top')
    ax3.text(0.25, y, desc, fontsize=9.5, color='#2c3e50',
             transform=ax3.transAxes, va='top')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('mj1511_catalytic_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: mj1511_catalytic_analysis.png")
